review_title: Xandria will save your time and money

pros: There are user friendly tool which will get more advanced features to configure the alert and monitoring the customer software its easy to use without any issues and easy to manage the software to trigger the alert in every 5 min based on your configuration settings in the tool
cons: There are few additional settings like web dispatcher in windows level need more improvements on the way of configuration was bit difficult.

description: My experience on Xandria its good to use customer application monitoring it will give the overall alert with description of the issues and path for the solution if they required and finally its a user friendly software no need to worry and also its minimize the cost / support

pros: Its easy to install the software and configuration of the SAP system without any issues

pros: it's intuitive and easy to analice alerts
cons: Some reports englobing all systems or between customer are not able to do

author: Devi Prasad K.
pros: The interactive dashboards which alert us on real time basis - helped us to manage file systems, DB tablespaces, System downs etc effectively .
cons: Java updates on AIX couldnt be pushed centrally from Xandria.

review_title: If you manage complex SAP systems - this is the product for you
description: I was truly surprised with this product. The company been around for 20 years with huge list of customers and I've never heard of it before. Anyhow, Xandria is a SAP performance monitoring, operation and management solution. It automated our SAP daily checks and saved us many hours per day. On top of that all of it is reported in a ready to give to management report. So even more saving. We also had issues with SAP solution manager errors and notification being very hard to understand making troubleshooting very hard. Xandria provides detailed errors and notification and perform predictive analysis this notify us on expected future failures so we can prevent them in advance. The installation was really simple, about 10 min per SAP server plus short time for the master and we were up and ready to go within two days. Their engineers are a pleasure to work with. I would highly recommend it to anyone managing complex SAP environments
author: Kevin G.
pros: Automated reporting Predictive failures and notifications Daily checks and monitoring

description: SAP Landscape, SAP Systems Monitoring has been enabled using the Xandria Monitoring Tool. It was easy to implement and kick off with. Configuring the thresholds for warning and critical alerts is also quite easy and the Syslink Support team is always on standby to help you out with Implementing and understanding the Software.
author: Vijish A.
pros: Implementation of Syslink Xandria Tool is very user friendly and easy to adapt. You just need to install the agents, import the requested changes to your Operating System Host and SAP System and that's it, you are ready to go with the most efficient SAP Monitoring. You can configure email alerts which we are currently using to notify the System Administrators about various critical alerts and warnings to identify and resolve various issues in the nascent stage.
cons: We faced some implementation issues with some Windows 2008 R2 machines which might be due to outdated network drivers/adapters.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: this helps run SAP in a easier way. Dashboards are good.
cons: the costs. Today, SAP offer free solutions and there are other cheaper solutions on the market
author_profession: CEO and Cofounder - TeamWork Architecture & Solutions

description: We are monitoring our customer's systems in a DevOps environment. We have international customers as well as local customers. Each has a different support model, SLA's, maintenance windows and procedures. With Xandria the effort of managing the system on a technical level decreased and our quality of monitoring, reporting and overall support increased
author: Theo E.
pros: The software is easy to use and easy to setup. It has an extremely broad customizing capabilities and it is very well documented.
cons: The notifications. It's a bit cumbersome to setup and it's not always working 100% as configured, causing multiple iterations and changes to the config.

description: The business loves the graphs generated in the reports and lot of information that the tool provides is useful for auditing purposes.
author: Lovneesh N.
pros: Ease of accessing the portal and the information that the tool provides is amazing. The reporting functionality is very valuable for our customers.
cons: Cannot customise the reports. As in cannot add comments to the reports.

author: Rohit Y.
pros: Dashboard, monitoring and real time information
cons: it needs to be more cost effective as licensing is very costly when all the corporates are looking for cost cutting
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: My overall experience has been extremely positive.
description: This software allows us to offer a best-in-class monitoring service to our SAP clients. Internally this software gives my team a single-pane-of-glass to monitor all their systems while providing efficiencies in our organization.
author: Nick M.
pros: The best areas of this software are its ease of deployment and ability to customize. Most monitoring products are limited in how they can be used and cumbersome to deploy. Xandria has been quick to deploy within in SAP landscape and customization, once you become familiar with the product, takes minutes.
cons: If I could change one aspect of this software it would be an agent-less deployment. There is no SAP monitoring tool today that offers this so I cannot say that this is an actual Xandria limitation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
